caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, spiked wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones is recorded in a podcast setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a small red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is speaking, with his facial expression shifting slightly across the frames. Behind him is a wall adorned with framed photographs and clothing displays, including garments from the brand "LEE". On-screen logos are visible on both sides of the man; the left logo reads "THE TALK PODCAST" and the right logo reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, continuing to speak into the microphone as his mouth moves and his gaze shifts slightly.
